description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on workflow dispatch and on push to specific paths. The workflow has four jobs: ci-v8, ci-quickjs, ci-nodejs, and test-workflow-download, all running on windows-2019. Each job checks out the code, adds msbuild to PATH, downloads an artifact from a different workflow, and performs build and unit test steps specific to V8, QuickJS, or Node.js.
